nodes.name: Albertine Rift montane forests
nodes.summary: Albertine Rift montane forests是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联44种鸟类，包括Barred long-tailed cuckoo、白枕鸽、Albertine owlet等44种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Mountain oriole
nodes.summary: The mountain oriole (Oriolus percivali) is a bird species in the family Oriolidae. It is native to the Albertine Rift montane forests, Uganda and Kenya. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. Taxonomy and systematics The mountain oriole has been considered by some authorities to be a subspecies of the black-headed oriole or the black-winged oriole. Alternate names for the mountain oriole include the black-tailed oriole, montane oriole and Percival's oriole. References
